detail.name: Fixed Rate Loan
detail.description: Fixed interest rate home loans for terms of one to five years.

features.additionalValue: Discounts on your Home & Contents insurance
features.additionalInfo: Breathe easier and save 30% on new policies when you combine home with contents insurance online.
Receive SMS notifications when your balance is above or below an amount, a deposit is made or when your salary is deposited.
It's free to make additional repayments (less than $10,000 per settlement anniversary).

eligibility.additionalInfo: You must be aged 18 or over.
Available to Australian citizen or Australian permanent resident.
Available to New Zealand citizens living in Australia.
Have and maintain an Australian residential address.

fees.name: Annual fee
fees.additionalInfo: There are no monthly, annual or transaction fees.

fees.name: Settlement fee
fees.additionalInfo: For each loan application and is charged at settlement.

fees.name: Change to letter of offer
fees.additionalInfo: This is payable if changes are made to the letter of offer between disclosure date (date of original issue) and settlement.

fees.name: Product switch
fees.additionalInfo: Automatically switches to a variable Mortgage Simplifier at the end of the fixed term free of charge. Break cost may be payable if at any time before the fixed term expires, you change your loan type.

fees.name: Removal or change to borrowers or guarantors
Fixed Rate Lock in
fees.additionalInfo: Charged to lock in your fixed rate prior to settlement and is charged per fixed rate loan account.

fees.name: Valuation Fee
fees.additionalInfo: A valuation fee is payable. ING will cover up to $225 of the valuation fee (GST inclusive) for the first valuation/property only.

fees.name: Late payment fee
fees.additionalInfo: $30 when you do not pay any amount owing within 5 days of its due date

lendingRates.additionalInfo: Owner occupier - Principal & Interest. Where an owner occupier Fixed Rate Loan is combined with an Orange Advantage (100% interest Offset) home loan, a fixed interest rate discount of 0.10% p.a. will apply to our advertised fixed interest rates.
